data.description:
Live code paths write dso-named files on every user's machine: ticket-init.sh:265,274,285 (mktemp /tmp/dso-init-wt.XXXXXX); ticket-lib.sh:1464 ($TMPDIR/dso-preconditions-warn warn-dedup dir); test-side /tmp/dso-*.XXXXXX in tests/integration/ticket-id-concurrency/run.sh:51 and test-ticket-deleted-not-counted-as-child.sh:38. Rename to rebar-*. Note ticket-lib.sh:1464 is a dedup keyspace — rename only resets one-time warnings; the forward-compat warn tests match stderr text not the dir name, so safe.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No dso-named paths created at runtime (source or tests)
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Rename dso-named runtime tmp paths (dso-init-wt, dso-preconditions-warn, test tmpdirs)
